title: 3D CoffeCup Totem
body:
# ☕ Minecraft 3D Coffee Cup Totem of Undying

A fun, stylish mod that replaces the classic Totem of Undying with a charming 3D coffee cup! Embrace your caffeine love in Minecraft by equipping this adorable item in your inventory. Not only does it look great, but it functions exactly like the original Totem of Undying, saving you from danger in a unique way.

---

## Features

- **3D Model**: A white coffee cup with a realistic 3D design, filled with "coffee" to give it that authentic look.
- **Totem Functionality**: Works like a regular Totem of Undying, giving you a second chance when facing life-threatening situations.
- **Inventory Preview**:
  ![Inventory Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QQiGUHKk/images/af52fa72e6c08c25e001a26126c3f8fcb865c323_350.webp)


## Compatibility

- **Minecraft Versions**: Compatible with Minecraft 1.16 and above.
- **Mod Loaders**: Works with both Forge and Fabric.

---

### Notes

- **Texture Details**: The coffee cup has a sleek, white texture, with a dark brown coffee color filling the inside, giving it a realistic touch in the Minecraft world.
- **No Performance Impact**: The mod has been optimized for smooth gameplay with minimal performance impact.

---

Enjoy bringing your love for coffee into Minecraft with this creative, life-saving Coffee Cup Totem!
